Appearances:
Plaintiff GORDON PROPERTY MANAGEMENT is present. Represented by Stephanie Sordan.
Attorney MARINA FRANCO appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant DON TOMAN is present.
Attorney JASON ALLEN appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem ELAN LAMBERT, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of SEP-30-2013 remains on calendar. (D501/JPT)
